name: Gradius
description: Konami's side-scrolling shooter franchise known for the Vic Viper, power meters, options, and checkpoint tension.

eras.title: Arcade Era
eras.description: Original arcade releases establishing the power-meter shooter formula.

eras.title: Console Expansion Era
eras.description: 16-bit, PlayStation, and PS2 entries expanding the series' technical and design range.
